name: Will workers comp pay for my surgery and time off after machine pinched my hand at work?
description: Yes, medical and partial lost wages covered; permanent if impaired.[1][4]

mainEntity.name: Will workers comp pay for my surgery and time off after machine pinched my hand at work?

acceptedAnswer.text: Yes, medical and partial lost wages covered; permanent if impaired.[1][4]
acceptedAnswer.description: Yes, covers medical care, temporary disability for lost wages (typically 66-75% pay).[1][4] Permanent benefits if lasting impairment.[1] Key factors: Reach medical stability for ratings; employer can't deny legit claims.[1][2] Follow treatment; track missed work.[4] Appeal denials at adjudication.[1]
